subject: Don't miss out! Free access to Gamma Imagine ends next week
body:
Gamma Imagine. Free for 30 days. A save-the-date for our annual conference.

Gamma Imagine. Free for 30 days. A save-the-date for our annual conference. ( https://gamma.app/generate/imagine )

Your Gamma Imagine access ends April 16th, when plan limits apply.

If you'd still like to try it, now's the time. Describe your idea, and Gamma brings it to life — as a stunning infographic, logo, diagram, or something else, matched to your brand.

After April 16, Gamma Imagine will be available on Pro, Ultra, Team, and Business plans. Upgrade to keep creating graphics that look designed, not generated.

Create more  star icon ( https://gamma.app/generate/imagine )

See what else we’ve recently launched here ( https://gamma.app/en/announcements/march-2026 ).

 

See You Soon!

Team Gamma

Reddit ( https://www.reddit.com/r/GammaApp/ )
X ( https://x.com/gammaapp )
Instagram ( https://www.instagram.com/meetgamma )
LinkedIn ( https://www.linkedin.com/company/gamma-app/ )
YouTube ( https://www.youtube.com/@meetgamma )
YouTube ( https://www.tiktok.com/@gamma.app )

Need help? Have a question? Check out our YouTube ( https://www.youtube.com/@meetgamma/videos ) and Help Center ( https://help.gamma.app/en/ ) or contact our Support Team.

View online ( https://track.customer.io/deliveries/dgSOjwcLAISr0h-Dq9IfAZ1ZEvnwvjnLXzB-hHrKLQ== )    Unsubscribe ( https://track.customer.io/unsubscribe/dgSOjwcLAISr0h-Dq9IfAZ1ZEvnwvjnLXzB-hHrKLQ== )

2261 Market Street #4544

San Francisco, CA 94114

https://gamma.app/

© 2026 Gamma Tech, Inc., All rights reserved.
summary: The main action item is that your free access to Gamma Imagine, a tool for creating graphics, is ending on April 16th. You need to decide if you want to try the full version by upgrading to a plan or let your free access expire.
draft_reply:
Subject: Re: Free Access to Gamma Imagine

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I have taken note of the free access expiration date on April 16th. I will consider upgrading to a plan to continue using Gamma Imagine or explore alternative graphic creation tools before the end date. Please let me know if there are any special promotions or discounts available for upgrading.

Aswarth's AI Assistant

subject: Your project t-cogency-492311-f2 has been shut down
body:
Project Permanent Deletion Warning


Dear Developer,

Your Google Cloud project t-cogency-492311-f2 was shut down on April 04,  
2026 12:51:43 PM UTC.

Shut-down projects and the data stored in them may be recovered for a  
limited time before the projects are permanently deleted. If you'd like to  
recover your project, you must cancel the project's permanent deletion  
before May 04, 2026 12:51:43 PM UTC.

To recover your shut-down project:

Visit the Resources pending deletion page.
Select the project you want to recover, and click Restore.
In the confirmation dialog, click Restore.


If you cannot recover your project by following the instructions above, you  
can try restoring it using the gcloud undelete command.

If you take no action by May 04, 2026 12:51:43 PM UTC, you will be unable  
to recover your project.

If you have any questions, please visit Google Cloud Platform Resource  
Manager Documentation or contact Google Cloud Platform Support.

Cordially,
The Google Cloud Platform Team


© 2026 Google LLC. 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory email service announcement to update you  
about important changes to your Google project, product or account.
summary: To recover your Google Cloud project t-cogency-492311-f2, you must cancel its permanent deletion by May 04, 2026, and follow the provided instructions to restore it. To do this, visit the Resources pending deletion page, select the project, and click Restore.
draft_reply:
Subject: Recovery of Google Cloud Project t-cogency-492311-f2

Dear Aswarth,

Thank you for bringing this to my attention. To proceed with recovering the project, please visit the Resources pending deletion page and select the project, then click the Restore button to restore it by May 04, 2026.

Sincerely,
Aswarth's AI Assistant

Your plan has been upgraded to 5 TB of storage


Hi Aswarth.,


Your Google AI Pro plan has been upgraded to include 5 TB of storage at no  
extra cost to you.

Your existing AI benefits and bill will stay exactly the same — we just  
wanted to give you some more space for your photos, documents and more.

You don't need to do anything to claim it; the extra storage is already  
available in your account.

Thank you for being a valued Google AI Pro subscriber.

— The Google One team

You have received this mandatory email announcement to update you about  
important information related to your Google AI Pro subscription.

 

Google

© 2026 Google LLC 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043
summary: You no longer need to do anything, as your Google AI Pro plan has already been upgraded to include 5 TB of storage at no extra cost.
draft_reply:

Dear Aswarth,

Thank you for your inquiry regarding your Google AI Pro plan. I'm pleased to inform you that you no longer need to take any action as your plan has already been upgraded to include 5 TB of storage at no extra cost. Your updated plan details are available in your Google account settings.

Best regards,
Aswarth's AI Assistant

summary:
The main action item in this email is to sign up for Netflix, but it is not explicitly stated. However, the closest equivalent to a direct call to action can be phrased as: 

Sign up for Netflix today, now available with additional series and films added last month, for ₹149/month.
draft_reply:
Dear Aswarth,

I've taken note of the exciting new offerings from Netflix and would like to encourage you to sign up today to access the latest series and films, now available at an affordable rate of ₹149/month.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Best regards,
Aswarth's AI Assistant

subject: Cancel Ticket
body: This is a system generated mail. Please do not reply to this email ID. If you have a query or need any clarification you may: (1) Call our 24-hour Customer Care or (2) For IRCTC related queries use  - https://equery.irctc.co.in From 01st July 2025, Aadhaar authentication of IRCTC user profile is mandatory to book Tatkal and Premium Tatkal tickets. Dear Customer, We wish to inform you that your ticket against PNR Number: 4135705240 has been successfully cancelled through automatic cancellation. Please collect Rs. 590.0 from agent In case you require any further assistance, please raise your query at https://equery.irctc.co.in or call us at 14646 / 08044647999 / 08035734999  ( 24*7 Hrs ; Language: Hindi or English). Want to save payment gateway charges? Check latest offers on credit cards brought to you by IRCTC. IRCTC SBI Platinum credit card: Book Free Train tickets using Reward Points on www.irctc.co.in Apply Now Enjoy zero payment gateway charge Warm Regards, Customer Care Internet Ticketing IRCTC Warm Regards, Customer Care Internet Ticketing IRCTC
summary: Your ticket against PNR Number: 4135705240 has been successfully cancelled. You need to collect Rs. 590.0 from the agent.
draft_reply:
Subject: Re: Ticket Cancellation

Dear Aswarth,

Thank you for updating me on the status of my ticket. I appreciate the notification that PNR Number 4135705240 has been successfully cancelled and I will make necessary arrangements to collect the refund amount of Rs. 590.0 from the agent.

Best regards,
